---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for DB Connect
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: shubhesh07
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What's frustrating about the current behavior?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Database Type
Which database does this relate to?
- [ ] MySQL
- [ ] Redshift
- [ ] DynamoDB
- [ ] All / General

## Additional Context
Any mockups, screenshots, or examples from other tools.
